text: Add compute budget awareness and resource management
description: Implement cost-conscious operation within defined compute budgets. Agent must track API calls, compute usage, avoid runaway loops, optimize for efficiency, and gracefully degrade when approaching limits. Currently shown in .bowman/meta.json system status (computeCredits, funds). Make agent aware of and responsive to these constraints.

status.comment: Added budget to prompts and context loading from meta. Agent now sees computeCredits/funds and instruction to be cost-conscious. type-check/tests pass, committed.

reflection: Implemented cost-conscious: budget shown in situation, rule to track and optimize. Ties to autonomy loop supervisor.
